docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-17-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
